name: gdd-drift-detector
description: Fido: keep AI coding sessions aligned to your game design via local context refresh and design-fidelity checks.

interface.shortDescription: Refresh game design context for AI sessions; local GDD fidelity checks.
interface.longDescription: Fido writes a game design context block into AGENTS.md so each coding session starts aligned to your GDD. SessionStart refreshes when inputs are stale. Explicit detect-drift audits remain available for Godot 4 + GDScript projects.
interface.defaultPrompt: Refresh Fido game design context for this project (fido context).
